MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Judge Kahn discloses that the General Counsel of the University of California is a close friend of his, but neither that friendship nor any other matter causes him to be other than fair and impartial in deciding this case. Plaintiff Anna Ruth Kelly's motion for leave to file first amended complaint is granted. No opposition filed. Ms. Kelly must file her first amended complaint by August 23, 2018. Order signed.
